name: I Love ‘A Lot Of’ You
original_name: รัก มาก เธอ
overview: Sun is tasked by the father of Sairung, a woman with dissociative identity disorder, to make all five of her personalities fall for him in an effort to fix her. One of her personalities, Manmok, becomes determined to throw him out of their lives.

trailers.title: [Official Trailer] I Love ‘A Lot Of’ You รัก มาก เธอ
